data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the category tagging feature (cosmetic, functional, safety), but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence of this feature. The linked use case mentions category tagging as a need, but there are no concrete examples or evidence of how this is implemented or validated. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities for category tagging.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for category tagging
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of category tagging.
